entities.name: ICT-ENABLED KNOWLEDGE SHARING
entities.description: The use of information and communication technologies to share knowledge to support agricultural extension.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL EXTENSION
entities.description: The process of applying scientific research and knowledge to agricultural practices through farmer education.

entities.name: DEVELOPING WORLD
entities.description: Regions characterized by lower industrialization and economic development, facing agrarian challenges.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns that threaten farming in the developing world.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country in the developing world used as a case study for ICT-enabled extension.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL AND RURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of improving the economic and social conditions of rural areas and farming.

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES QUALITY
entities.description: The state and health of environmental resources necessary for farming.

entities.name: DESERTIFICATION
entities.description: The process by which fertile land becomes desert, typically as a result of drought or deforestation.

entities.name: COPING AND ADAPTATION STRATEGIES
entities.description: Approaches used at micro and macro levels to manage the impacts of climate change and resource degradation.

entities.name: GLOBALIZATION OF COMMODITY TRADE
entities.description: The integration of local agricultural markets into the global trade system.

entities.name: RESEARCH AND EXTENSION SUB SYSTEMS
entities.description: The interconnected components of scientific research and the delivery of that research to farmers.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE SYSTEMS
entities.description: The broader framework encompassing research, extension, and knowledge sharing in agriculture.

entities.name: INFORMATION AND COMMUNICATION TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Digital tools and platforms used to facilitate information access and mediation services.

entities.name: INFORMATION ACCESS
entities.description: The ability of farmers and extension workers to obtain relevant agricultural data and knowledge.

entities.name: HUMAN CAPACITY
entities.description: The skills, knowledge, and abilities of individuals involved in agricultural extension processes.
